outputs: The water in the west stairwell has passed inspection. It should not be thanked.
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
warnings: Do not correct grammar in terminal captures. The terminal is allowed to make mistakes when it is afraid of being too specific.
The training copy may contain deliberate duplicated text. Duplicate text must be preserved in order to prove the copy is not the original.
If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
